_meta.description: FRM module definitions — single source of truth for module IDs, labels, dependencies, and sub-areas.

modules.label: Entity & Ownership Risk
modules.description: Risks arising from ownership structure, beneficial ownership opacity, related-party transactions, and shell entity exposure.
sub_areas: Shell entity or nominee structure risk

modules.label: Financial Crime / AML Risk
modules.description: AML/CFT obligations, KYC controls, transaction monitoring, sanctions screening, and suspicious activity reporting.
sub_areas: KYC and customer due diligence (CDD) controls
PEP identification and enhanced due diligence

modules.label: Procurement & Vendor Risk
modules.description: Fraud risks in procurement cycles: vendor selection, purchase orders, invoice processing, and contract management.
sub_areas: Purchase order approval and segregation of duties
Invoice processing and duplicate payment controls

modules.label: HR & Payroll Risk
modules.description: Ghost employees, payroll manipulation, timesheet fraud, and HR data integrity risks.
sub_areas: HR master data integrity and change controls

modules.label: Revenue & Receivables Risk
modules.description: Revenue recognition manipulation, billing fraud, collections irregularities, and receivables misstatement.

modules.label: Fixed Assets & Capex Risk
modules.description: Asset misappropriation, capex vs opex misclassification, ghost assets, and disposal irregularities.

modules.label: Management Override & Governance Risk
modules.description: Tone at the top, board oversight, journal entry manipulation, and override of internal controls.
sub_areas: Board and audit committee oversight effectiveness
Conflicts of interest policy and declaration
Code of conduct and ethics training

modules.label: Regulatory & Compliance Risk
modules.description: Regulatory reporting obligations, licence compliance, AML/CFT regulatory gaps, and enforcement exposure.
